lines.content: Hello, good afternoon. This is Joanna from Einstein. Moving is this Grayson?

lines.content: Hi Grayson, we received your quotation request online about an upcoming move. Just want to check if this is a good time to discuss that move. Awesome. Thank you just to confirm you're planning to do it next month around the 3rd of August, is that correct?
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Thank you. Alright, and then your email address. I'll send everything in an your last name that your first name @gmail.com is that right.

lines.content: Okay, the address that we're coming from is 110 Camden cove and that will be in beta and basically this is a maybe within bu, going 21480 cabella drive as well. Now. I actually checked the house that we're coming from I believe it's about 2400 square footage but from what I can see here you're just planning to move partially, is that correct or you just, you just, you only have just a few items to move just to confirm not the whole house.

lines.content: Yeah, it's really just a few bigger items like a couch, Washer/Dryer that sort of thing.

lines.content: Okay, sure, no problem. In order for us to have a better idea on how it's gonna look back on today. Will you be able to give me a list of everything we're moving for you?

lines.content: Yes, it will be a small gun safe maybe £250 a couch washer and dryer three desks and I believe that's it.

lines.content: Okay, no bedroom suite, no dining kitchen appliance, is that correct?
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Yeah, it'll just, let me just look over real quick. Yeah, I believe that should be all the items.

lines.content: Yeah, sure, sure. Of course, take your time. Okay, and then just together with the couch. Just wondering we not moving any coffee table and tables, any other living room items? Just a catch. Okay, alright, that's fine. And then in terms of boxes typically for two bed report of items usually we end up with about 25 to 35 boxes. Do you think you will be within this range or lesser than that, or more than that?

lines.content: Little less than that. I mean, it's really just gonna be those items. The biggest issue is just getting them into the apartment, is what I'm worried about. The other stuff we can handle. That's why I was looking into this.
lines.name: Grayson Tinsman

lines.content: Mm-hmm sure, sure. Of course, no problem. That's fine. So for now just no boxes on the day.
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Yeah, I don't, there shouldn't be any.
lines.name: Grayson Tinsman

lines.content: Okay, no worries. Thank you. Do you have any, any issues with parking in terms of your pickup location? Steep driveway, low hanging branches that you want me to take note of at this time.
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: No, the driveway is clear even for a large vehicle and then at the destiny.
lines.name: Grayson Tinsman

lines.content: Okay, I did that. As so, I'm sorry you got caught off. So, at the destination, can we already park near the stairs at the ground floor?
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Okay. And once we get to the third floor is your apartment near the stairs as well?
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Yeah, I mean, I think there's only four per floor and then there's two sets of stairs so on either side but yes, should be close.
lines.name: Grayson Tinsman

lines.content: Okay, got it. Thank you. So. Alright, do you have any special instructions concerns firsts about moving in general that you want me to take note of at this time?
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: No, like I said, just I was just worried about moving something like the washer and dryer where it kind of delicate myself but yeah, that's the only issue.
lines.name: Grayson Tinsman

lines.content: Of course, no problem. Alright, so on how we work in our charges as well gray since. So we charge by the hour for all of our services and if we're doing a move on a Monday that's $103 per hour per mover for this move we just recommend you guys to help us out which is $206 per hour. So, that already includes the two men the truck bill. Use all the wrap to protect your furniture, blanket pads and shrink wraps. If you need help to disassemble reassembly. That's already part of the services, taxes, insurance, credit card fees, all of that is already included in the price. Now, we also include other features like our no worries, damage coverage. Which would give you up to $2,000 coverage for any accidental damages. So that's already included.
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Ed, also meet your mover feature. So we'll send you the names of the gas ahead of time. Rest assured we don't take daily contract. The workers her guys are the most of that and movers in the industry and we will send you their names ahead of time to let you know who's coming to help out with the move, and lastly on time guarantee if we run late on the time we schedule, we provide discounts by the end of the day. Again, no hidden fees of any type, no credit card fees, no sterle fees. No transportation is already included in the price as for the clock, it will only start once we arrive at your pickup location and open the contract for you can have us for as long as you need us and for any move we just have a two and a half hour.
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: But once we go over the minimum, we only charge in fifteen minute increments. Does that make sense?
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Yes. And you said a, a two and a half minimum.
lines.name: Grayson Tinsman

lines.content: One and a half hour minimum. Yes, that's right.
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Okay, alright. Now typically a, a move this size usually since it's just you know pieces of furniture if only, it's like a ground to ground kind of moving and close distance definitely. I was hoping that we'd be able to finish within the minimum but you're a new place just to confirm third floor, only stairs, no elevators, is that right?
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Okay, and just take notes since you've mentioned the gun safe is about £200 and then of course the washer and dryer we only move up to £300, okay? If it's anything more than that we won't be able to move it for you but if it's less than that we should be fine now. Just wanna add a little bit more time to that. So for the meantime, I'm just estimating your move more on the three to three and a half hour mark which is an estimated budget of $721 but obviously if it takes shorter than that then that's okay. You only pay for how long it will take after the two and a half hour minimum.
lines.name: Joanna Ballon

lines.content: Okay, alright, if that's all good with you, I can already get you on the schedule first job of the days and arrival between 8:30 AM and 9:00 AM.

lines.content: Mm-hmm yeah, no problem. And then I'll send you an email with the quotation now feel free to send us a photo of the safe as well of course just to make sure we'll be able to move it for you. Just don't wanna guys arrive there and we won't be able to move it but yeah, just feel free to send us a photo as well just in case. Okay.

lines.content: Thank you so much and have a good day.
